label: Rates Overview
description: Comparison table of APY rates across lending protocols, staking pools, and LP positions.

0.1.note: error boundary via WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx confirmed. 0.2/0.3 entitlements and availableOn set.

0.6.note: isLoading=false wired to TableWidget (context does not expose isLoading — open finding).

0.8.note: error not wirable without context change — TableWidget accepts it when context adds it (open finding).

l0.notes: 0.1 error boundary via WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx confirmed. 0.2/0.3 entitlements and availableOn set. 0.4 no any/ts-ignore. 0.5 no mock imports in widget. 0.6 isLoading=false wired to TableWidget (context does not expose isLoading — open finding). 0.7 emptyMessage passed to TableWidget. 0.8 error not wirable without context change — TableWidget accepts it when context adds it (open finding). 0.9 no dead code.

1.3.note: — adjustedLiquidityPools and adjustedStakingProtocols memos return [] when !hasDefiDesk (fixed in defi-data-context.tsx); lendingProtocols was already filtered.

1.4.note: — clientIds destructured and acknowledged; protocol types (LendingProtocol, StakingProtocol, LiquidityPool) have no clientId field — full narrowing requires BP-5 schema change.

1.5.note: — strategyIds filter applied to tradeHistory; rates data (lending/staking/LP) are reference lists with no strategyId field so strategy filter is N/A for rates.

1.6.note: — empty organizationIds returns all data (hasDefiDesk=true when length=0).

1.7.note: known-gap — reference data in lib/mocks/fixtures/; moving to lib/constants/ is BP-5 scope.

l1.notes: 1.1 data sourced via useDeFiData() — pass. 1.2 context calls useGlobalScope() — pass. 1.3 pass — adjustedLiquidityPools and adjustedStakingProtocols memos return [] when !hasDefiDesk (fixed in defi-data-context.tsx); lendingProtocols was already filtered. 1.4 partial — clientIds destructured and acknowledged; protocol types (LendingProtocol, StakingProtocol, LiquidityPool) have no clientId field — full narrowing requires BP-5 schema change. 1.5 partial — strategyIds filter applied to tradeHistory; rates data (lending/staking/LP) are reference lists with no strategyId field so strategy filter is N/A for rates. 1.6 pass — empty organizationIds returns all data (hasDefiDesk=true when length=0). 1.7 known-gap — reference data in lib/mocks/fixtures/; moving to lib/constants/ is BP-5 scope.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

gaps.notes: YIELD_ROTATION_LENDING §9 DeFi/LST yield: Cross-LST rotation not a "lending" operation per se — consider a separate archetype or fold into YIELD_STAKING_SIMPLE rotation mode
YIELD_STAKING_SIMPLE §10 DeFi/staking (multi-LST rotation): Rotation mode exists in code but no instance declared

findings.description: defi-data-context does not expose isLoading field. Widget now passes isLoading={false} to TableWidget explicitly. Full loading state requires context to add an isLoading field.
defi-data-context does not expose an error field. TableWidget accepts an error prop when available. Full error state requires context to add an error field.
liquidityPools and stakingProtocols were returned as raw unfiltered constants regardless of org scope — fixed: adjustedLiquidityPools and adjustedStakingProtocols memos return [] when !hasDefiDesk.
No clientId filter applicable — protocol types have no clientId field. clientIds acknowledged in context; narrowing deferred to BP-5 schema change.
Strategy filter (globalScope.strategyIds) applied to tradeHistory. Rates reference data (lending/staking/LP) has no strategyId field — strategy filter is N/A for rates tables.
LENDING_PROTOCOLS, STAKING_PROTOCOLS, LIQUIDITY_POOLS imported from lib/mocks/fixtures/. Moving to lib/constants/ is BP-5 scope.

l1FixedBy: defi-data-context.tsx — adjustedStakingProtocols + adjustedLiquidityPools memos with hasDefiDesk guard
